# Filesystem Edge Cases Test
# Tests boundary conditions and special scenarios

# Build the filesystem server binary
go build -o mcp-filesystem-server .

# Create a temporary test directory with edge case files
mkdir test_dir
cd test_dir
echo "" > empty_file.txt
echo -n "no_newline" > no_newline.txt
printf "binary\x00data\xff" > binary_file.bin
mkdir -p nested/deep/directory

# Test edge cases
exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"empty_file.txt"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"no_newline.txt"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"binary_file.bin"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"nested/deep/new_file.txt","content":"Deep nested content"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_directory","arguments":{"path":"nested/deep/directory"}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"unicode_file.txt","content":"🚀 Unicode content 中文"}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"unicode_file.txt"}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_file_info","arguments":{"path":"."}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"overwrite.txt","content":"Original"}},"id":11}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"overwrite.txt","content":"Overwritten"}},"id":12}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"overwrite.txt"}},"id":13}
EOF

# Verify empty file handling
stdout '""'

# Verify file without newline
stdout 'no_newline'

# Verify binary file handling (may contain special characters)
stdout 'binary.*data'

# Verify deep nested file creation
stdout 'Successfully wrote.*Deep nested content'

# Verify empty directory listing
stdout '\[\]'

# Verify Unicode content handling
stdout '🚀 Unicode content 中文'

# Verify directory info
stdout '"type":"directory"'

# Verify file overwriting
stdout 'Overwritten'

# Test relative path handling
exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"./relative.txt","content":"Relative path"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"./relative.txt"}},"id":4}
EOF

# Verify relative path handling
stdout 'Successfully wrote'
stdout 'Relative path'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_dir
